waves.point_eqs_str: a['smp']=(a['sample']*6.283); a['xp']=(Math.sin(a['smp'])*0.10); a['yp']=(Math.cos(a['smp'])*0.10); a['zp']=0; a['angy']=(Math.sin((((a['sample']*6.28)*4)+a['t1']))*6.28); a['xq']=((a['xp']*Math.cos(a['angy']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['angy']))); a['zq']=((a['xp']*Math.sin(a['angy']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['angy']))); a['xp']=a['xq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['angy']=(a['t1']*0.1); a['xq']=((a['xp']*Math.cos(a['angy']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['angy']))); a['zq']=((a['xp']*Math.sin(a['angy']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['angy']))); a['xp']=a['xq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['axs1']=(Math.sin((a['t1']*0.15))+1.6); a['yq']=((a['yp']*Math.cos(a['axs1']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['axs1']))); a['zq']=((a['yp']*Math.sin(a['axs1']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['axs1']))); a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['axs2']=(Math.sin((a['t1']*0.1))*3.3); a['xq']=((a['xp']*Math.cos(a['axs2']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['axs2']))); a['zq']=((a['xp']*Math.sin(a['axs2']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['axs2']))); a['xp']=a['xq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['yp']=(a['yp']*1.2); a['zp']=(a['zp']+2.1); a['xs']=div(a['xp'],a['zp']); a['ys']=div(a['yp'],a['zp']); a['x']=(a['xs']+0.5); a['y']=(a['ys']+0.5); a['vol']=a['bass'];
